title: RedactionExportSummary
description: Summary of a redacted or signed export generated from evidence.

export_id.description: A unique identifier for this redacted export.

export_type.description: The type of export (e.g., redacted_evidence_pack, executive_summary, audit_export).

redacted_fields.description: Fields that were redacted in this export.

intended_recipient.description: The intended recipient or audience for this export.

evidence_reference.description: A reference to this export in the evidence store.
